solutionRows.label: AI Copilot
solutionRows.value: Natural language answers for your leadership

problem.title: The market is moving. Your tools must keep up.
problem.subtitle: The rise of intra-African trade (AfCFTA), export agreements with China and the European Union, and the modernisation of logistics corridors demand a new standard of rigour. Running a factory or warehouse on paper or scattered Excel files is no longer an option.

points.title: Zero visibility
points.body: Invisible money losses on raw materials and stock. No traceability, no reliable real-time figures.

points.title: Multi-site complexity
points.body: A factory in Lomé, a warehouse in Cotonou, and no centralised data. Every site runs in its own corner with no group-wide view.

points.title: Ill-fitted software
points.body: Overpriced SAP or Sage licences with no one internally able to configure them or train teams. The tool goes unused.

problem.solutionBody: Bluwa guarantees your operational rigour: multi-site, multi-currency, with an AI copilot that answers your leadership in real time.

features.title: Far more than software: a framework of rigour for your teams.
features.subtitle: Three complementary pillars designed to guarantee your operational success, from installation through to your team's full competency.

items.title: bluwa_ERP
items.body: An ultra-stable Cloud & Mobile platform to manage your BOMs, critical stock, traceability and shop floors. Natively multi-currency (XOF, NGN, GHS, USD) and multilingual.

items.title: The 30-day Guaranteed Trial
items.body: You pay for installation, we configure your site. If the tool doesn't suit you after one month, you leave without paying a single subscription month. Zero risk.

items.title: bluwa_Academy
items.body: Our teams and certified programmes train your operators and workshop managers directly on the ground for 3 months to guarantee the success of the integration.

presence.title: Built for the whole of West Africa
presence.subtitle: 16 countries · 500 million people · A market virtually untapped by industrial ERP.

pilot.title: Become a founding client.
pilot.subtitle: 10 pioneering companies to co-build the ERP standard for West African agri-food industry. Limited spots.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing, tailored to your scale.
pricing.subtitle: Two simple steps. Zero hidden costs.
pricing.perSiteNote: Subscription is billed per site, not per organisation.
pricing.perSiteDetail: Each factory or warehouse has its own secure configuration. You pay for what you use, nothing more.
pricing.billingNote: Prices shown are in XOF for WAEMU countries. Clients outside WAEMU (Nigeria, Ghana, Guinea, etc.) are billed in USD at the prevailing exchange rate.
pricing.step1Subtitle: One-time · setup + data import + 3 months of support

ctaBanner.title: Ready to reach the next level of industrial rigour?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Join the companies already digitalising the region's supply chain with bluwa.

items.q: How does the 30-day guaranteed trial work?
items.a: You pay the one-time installation fee at signing (covers setup, configuration and 3 months of support). The first SaaS month is on us. Not the right fit after 30 days? Walk away, no further billing.

items.q: What do the installation fees cover?
items.a: Technical setup, configuration, initial settings, team training, and 3 months of post-install support. It's a one-time payment at signing.

items.q: Is there a discount for annual commitment?
items.a: Yes. A 12-month commitment gives you 2 free months (≈ 15% off). Option A: pay 10 months upfront. Option B: pay monthly with a 12-month contract.

items.q: Why is the subscription billed per site?
items.a: So your cost stays predictable and proportional to your actual activity. Each site has its own database, configuration and users. No hidden 'per user' charges like traditional ERPs.

items.q: Can bluwa scale with my group's growth?
items.a: Yes. bluwa is designed to grow with you, from a single production unit to a multi-site, multi-country group. Phase 2 of bluwa_ERP will add ADV, HACCP and Logistics WM modules, followed by Engineering & Methods in Phase 3. The ecosystem will also expand with dedicated products: bluwa_CRM, bluwa_WMS and bluwa_Warehouses, with launch dates to be announced in due course.
Yes. Field apps (production, inventory) work without connectivity and sync automatically as soon as the network is restored.
